name: 19oz Tall Recycled Pint Glass Brown - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Impress your guests by serving beverages in this Tall Pint Glass from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of 100% recycled glass, this tall glass is designed in a brown hue that makes the drinks look appealing. With a capacity of 19 fluid ounces, this print glass is ideal for serving refreshing mocktails, beers, and mixed drinks for sophisticated flair.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
